name: Korean Meat Fritters (Chen Ya)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice meat into 3" x 4" x 1/4" pieces.
2. Combine all ingredients except eggs in a bowl and soak the meat for one hour.
3. Flour the meat, dip it in slightly beaten egg, and fry over medium heat until brown.
4. Serve hot with sauce.
Sauce:
2 tbsp Soy sauce
1 tsp Chopped green onion
1 tsp Sesame seeds
1 tsp Vinegar
1 tsp Sugar
Mix all ingredients together.
